trustCheckin.step1Desc: Confirm your identity with photo verification
trustCheckin.emsInfo: In case of a life-threatening emergency, we will contact EMS (119) first, then you immediately.
trustCheckin.firstAidConsent: I authorize the specialist to administer basic first aid (wound cleaning, bandaging, ice packs) if medically necessary during the session.
trustCheckin.noContagiousConsent: I confirm my child has no undisclosed contagious conditions (fever, rash, vomiting, diarrhea) within the past 48 hours.
trustCheckin.emergencyTransportConsent: In a medical emergency, I authorize the specialist to call EMS (119) and accompany my child to the nearest hospital if I cannot be reached within 5 minutes.
trustCheckin.acceptProtocols: Please accept all safety protocols and consent items.
trustCheckin.signToAcknowledge: Please sign to acknowledge transfer of care.
trustCheckin.fillAllFields: Please fill in all required fields.
trustCheckin.allergiesHint: Leave blank if no known allergies.
trustCheckin.specialConditionsHint: Any condition the specialist should be aware of.
trustCheckin.windowsSecured: All windows in the room are secured and child-locked.
trustCheckin.balconyLocked: Balcony door is locked and inaccessible to children.
trustCheckin.hazardsRemoved: Sharp objects, medications, and small choking hazards have been removed from the child's reach.
trustCheckin.emergencyExitKnown: I have shown the specialist the nearest emergency exit and fire extinguisher location.
trustCheckin.signatureDesc: Please review and sign below to complete the care handover.
trustCheckin.signatureSummary: By signing below, I acknowledge that I have provided accurate medical and emergency contact information, confirmed the room safety checklist, and consent to the care protocols outlined above. I understand the specialist will follow Petit Stay's Trust Protocol throughout the session.

landing.heroTitle: Care that travels with your family
landing.heroSubtitle: Petit Stay connects luxury hotels with vetted childcare specialists, so you can enjoy your stay while your little ones are in trusted hands.
landing.featuresSubtitle: Every detail is crafted to give parents confidence and children joy during hotel stays.
landing.feature1Desc: Every session is backed by comprehensive liability insurance, so you can relax knowing your family is fully protected.
landing.feature2Desc: Background-checked, professionally trained specialists with our Gold/Silver tier system ensure the highest standard of childcare.
landing.feature3Desc: Standardized operating procedures for every scenario — allergies, emergencies, bedtime routines — designed with 5-star hotels.
landing.feature4Desc: Enjoy a night out while certified specialists care for your children in the comfort of your hotel room, with real-time updates.
landing.step1Desc: Browse our network of premium partner hotels and select the perfect location for your stay.
landing.step2Desc: Choose a certified childcare specialist, pick your time, and complete our Trust Protocol check-in.
landing.step3Desc: Relax knowing your children are in expert hands with real-time updates and 24/7 support.
landing.testimonial1Quote: Petit Stay transformed our hotel experience. The sitter was incredible with our kids, and the live updates gave us complete peace of mind during dinner.
landing.testimonial2Quote: The Trust Protocol check-in made us feel so secure. We could see every activity in real-time. It's the gold standard in hotel childcare.
landing.testimonial3Quote: Since partnering with Petit Stay, our guest satisfaction scores for families have increased by 40%. It's become our most requested service.
landing.ctaTitle: The childcare platform transforming your hotel's family experience
landing.ctaSubtitle: Start a new family care experience with premium hotels.
landing.footerTagline: The premium family care partner trusted by leading hotels.

guest.consentSubtitle: Please review and agree to the following before proceeding.
guest.careConsentLabel: I consent to the childcare service
guest.careConsentDetail: I authorize Petit Stay and the assigned specialist to provide childcare services for my child(ren) during the scheduled session. The specialist will follow hotel-approved activity guidelines, including play, snack time, and rest. I understand that the specialist is a vetted, certified professional and that the session will be conducted in accordance with Petit Stay's Trust Protocol.
guest.privacyConsentLabel: I consent to personal information collection
guest.privacyConsentDetail: I agree to the collection and processing of personal information including my name, contact details, child(ren)'s name, age, medical/allergy information, and emergency contact details. This data is processed in accordance with Korea's Personal Information Protection Act (PIPA) and is retained only for the duration necessary to provide the service. Data is stored securely and is not shared with third parties beyond what is necessary for service delivery.
guest.emergencyConsentLabel: I consent to emergency response procedures
guest.emergencyConsentDetail: In the event of a medical emergency, I authorize the specialist to: (1) administer basic first aid, (2) contact emergency services (119), (3) accompany my child to the nearest hospital if I cannot be reached within 5 minutes, and (4) share relevant medical information with emergency responders. I understand that Petit Stay carries comprehensive liability insurance covering up to KRW 100,000,000 per incident.

about.title: About Petit Stay
about.subtitle: Petit Stay is a hotel-integrated premium childcare platform that fills the care gap when international tourist families need evening or cultural outings. We provide multilingual booking, liability insurance, standardized operating procedures (SOPs), a hotel console, and evening sitter assignment — so hotels can recommend and sell our service with zero risk.
about.missionDesc: We build standardized family care infrastructure that hotels can trust.
about.howWeWorkDesc: Hotels partner with Petit Stay to offer on-demand babysitting through our concierge platform. Guest families book through the hotel front desk or directly via our app. Every specialist is background-checked, first-aid certified, and trained in hospitality service standards. Our platform handles the entire workflow — from booking and identity verification to real-time monitoring, payment settlement, and post-session feedback.
about.bullet1: Real-time session monitoring with activity logs and photo updates
about.bullet2: QR-based secure check-in, identity verification, and handoff protocol
about.bullet4: Comprehensive liability coverage on every booking (up to ₩100M per incident)
about.whereDesc: Based in Seoul, we target five-star hotels starting with premium properties in Gangnam, Jongno, and Yeouido. Our operations team is available 24/7 to support active sessions.
about.teamDesc: Petit Stay is led by a founder whose career spans hospitality operations and full-stack development. From launching F&B ventures to building services with React and Firebase, from living in Tokyo to exploring hospitality across 20 countries, and from volunteering with the Green Umbrella Children's Foundation — these experiences shaped the service philosophy behind Petit Stay. Together with childcare specialists, hotel partnership managers, and engineers, we are building Korea's most trusted hotel childcare platform.
about.visionDesc: We create a world where families can travel with their children in complete peace of mind.
about.storyDesc1: Petit Stay was born from a firsthand observation: luxury hotels in Seoul offer world-class dining, spas, and concierge services, yet parents traveling with young children have virtually no reliable childcare options. Hotel concierge teams receive frequent requests but lack the infrastructure, liability coverage, and specialist networks to respond safely.
about.storyDesc2: In 2026, Petit Stay was founded to close this gap. By combining hospitality operations expertise with modern platform technology, we built a service that delivers institutional-grade safety with the warmth and attentiveness families deserve.
about.value_safetyDesc: Every decision we make prioritizes the physical and emotional safety of children in our care.
about.value_trustDesc: Transparency, verification, and real-time visibility are built into every layer of our platform.
about.value_accessibilityDesc: Multi-language, multi-currency support ensures families from any country feel at home.
about.value_transparencyDesc: Clear pricing, real-time session updates, and open communication at every step.
about.value_partnershipDesc: We succeed when our hotel partners, specialist network, and guest families all thrive together.
about.value_excellenceDesc: We hold ourselves to the highest standards in every interaction, from specialist training to platform reliability.

careers.title: Careers
careers.subtitle: Join us in setting a new standard for hotel family care.
careers.whyDesc: Petit Stay is an early-stage startup preparing for service launch in 2026. We're looking for people who want to build the product alongside the founder. Solve a real problem — the childcare gap for hotel guests with young children — with technology, starting in Korea and expanding across Asia.
careers.job1Desc: Build core features of our React 19/TypeScript/Firebase platform — real-time session monitoring, booking flows, and hotel console. Remote work available (Asia-Pacific timezone). Firestore and Cloud Functions experience preferred.
careers.job2Desc: Go directly to five-star hotels in Seoul to create partnerships from scratch. You'll own the entire process — from target research and pitching to negotiation and onboarding.
careers.job3Desc: A critical role that directly shapes service quality. Lead specialist recruitment, screening, and training — managing background checks, first-aid certification, and hospitality training programs.
careers.job4Desc: Design trust-centered UX for three distinct user groups — parents who need reassurance, specialists who need efficient workflows, and hotel staff who need operational clarity. Remote (Asia-Pacific timezone).
careers.benefit1: Stock options — early-stage equity for all full-time team members
careers.benefit2: Flexible remote work with quarterly team gatherings in Seoul
careers.benefit3: Annual learning budget (₩2,000,000) for conferences, courses, and certifications
careers.benefit4: Health insurance and annual health check-up coverage
careers.applyEmail: Send your resume and a brief note about why you are interested to careers@petitstay.com. We review every application and aim to respond within five business days.
careers.cultureDesc: We're a small, high-density team. Everyone takes ownership and moves fast, but we never cut corners when it comes to children's safety. Built on honest communication and mutual trust, we aim to deliver the highest value to everyone we serve — children, parents, specialists, and hotel partners.
careers.lookingFor1: People who take ownership and drive projects to completion without waiting for instructions
careers.lookingFor2: Builders who are comfortable working across disciplines — from code to customer conversations
careers.lookingFor3: Professionals who understand that safety and trust cannot be an afterthought in childcare
careers.lookingFor4: Team players who communicate openly, give honest feedback, and support each other
careers.processStep1: Submit your resume and a brief cover note explaining why you are interested in Petit Stay
careers.processStep2: Initial screening call with our team (30 minutes) to discuss your background and goals
careers.processStep3: Technical or role-specific assessment — a practical task reflecting real work you would do here
careers.processStep4: Final interview with the founder, followed by an offer within 5 business days
careers.job5Desc: Design and implement serverless backend services — matching algorithms, payment settlement, notification systems, and data pipelines. Experience with Node.js, Firebase Cloud Functions, and Firestore required.
careers.benefit5: Home office setup allowance (₩1,000,000 for new hires)
careers.benefit6: Unlimited paid time off with a minimum 15-day annual expectation

press.title: Press
press.subtitle: News and media resources.
press.news1Title: Petit Stay Launches Premium Hotel Pilot in Seoul
press.news1Desc: Petit Stay begins pilot operations with select five-star hotels in Gangnam and Jongno, providing on-demand vetted specialist matching for hotel guests. May 2026.
press.news2Title: Petit Stay Selected for Government Startup Acceleration Program
press.news2Desc: Petit Stay has been selected for a government-backed startup program, recognizing its innovative B2B2C approach to hotel childcare. The program accelerates platform development and hotel partner acquisition. June 2026.
press.mediaKitDesc: For logos, brand guidelines, and high-resolution images, please contact our communications team at press@petitstay.com.
press.inquiriesDesc: Journalists and media professionals can reach us at press@petitstay.com. We aim to respond to all inquiries within 24 hours.
press.news3Title: Petit Stay Signs First Official Hotel Partnership
press.news3Desc: Petit Stay has signed its first official partnership with a premium Seoul hotel. Based on successful pilot results, the hotel has committed to full-time service integration, with additional hotel expansion underway. August 2026.
press.news4Title: Petit Stay Prepares Pre-Seed Funding Round
press.news4Desc: Hotel childcare platform Petit Stay is preparing a pre-seed funding round to scale operations and expand its specialist network. Investor meetings are underway, backed by pilot data and confirmed hotel partnerships. Scheduled for October 2026.

help.title: Help Center
help.subtitle: Frequently asked questions and support.
help.a1: Petit Stay is a premium childcare platform for hotel guests at partner properties. Book through the hotel concierge or our app, and a vetted specialist arrives at your hotel. Real-time monitoring and liability insurance are included for complete peace of mind.
help.a2: Enter your preferred date, time, and child details through the hotel concierge desk or the Petit Stay app. Once a specialist is matched, you receive a confirmation notification. The specialist checks in at the hotel front desk via QR code.
help.a3: Every specialist undergoes ID verification, criminal background checks, and child abuse registry screening. They must hold valid CPR and first-aid certifications and complete our hospitality training program. Credentials are renewed regularly.
help.a4: Every booking automatically includes liability insurance (up to ₩100M per incident). Identity is verified via QR check-in, and activity logs and photos are streamed to the parent app in real time. Our 24/7 operations team is always on standby.
help.a5: Standard rates start at ₩60,000 per hour, including the specialist fee, platform fee, and insurance. Final pricing is displayed before you confirm. Hotels may offer their own bundled packages.
help.a6: Free cancellation is available up to 2 hours before the scheduled start time. Cancellations within 2 hours incur a 50% fee, and no-shows are charged in full. If Petit Stay cancels for safety reasons, a full refund is issued.
help.a7: The specialist immediately contacts emergency services (119) and notifies parents in real time through the app. The hotel front desk is also alerted, and our 24/7 operations team coordinates support until the situation is resolved.
help.a8: Petit Stay is currently available at partner hotels in Seoul. If your hotel is not yet in our network, suggest they contact partners@petitstay.com to join.
help.q9: Can I communicate my child's special needs?
help.a9: Yes, during booking you can provide detailed information about allergies, dietary restrictions, medical conditions, and activity preferences. Your assigned specialist reviews this before the session and provides personalized care accordingly.
help.q10: How can a hotel become a Petit Stay partner?
help.a10: Hotels can contact us at partners@petitstay.com. Our team will guide you through partnership terms, technical integration, and pilot operations. The model involves zero cost and zero risk for the hotel.
help.contactDesc: Could not find what you were looking for? Reach out to our support team at support@petitstay.com or use the in-app chat feature. We are available 24/7 during active sessions.

privacy.title: Privacy Policy
privacy.subtitle: In accordance with Article 30 of the Personal Information Protection Act (PIPA), Petit Stay Inc. processes user personal information as follows.
privacy.section1Content: We collect information you provide directly when creating an account or making a booking: name, email address, phone number, and payment details. For child safety matching, we collect children's age and any special care requirements. During sessions, we collect activity logs and photos shared by specialists. We also collect device information and usage data for platform security and improvement.
privacy.section2Content: We use your information to: process and manage bookings between families, hotels, and specialists; verify specialist qualifications and conduct background checks; send booking confirmations, real-time session updates, and safety notifications; match specialists based on language, age group, and availability; process payments and issue receipts; improve our services through aggregated, anonymized analytics; and comply with legal obligations under Korean law.
privacy.section3Content: We share relevant booking details with hotel partners and assigned specialists solely to facilitate the requested service. We do not sell personal information to third parties. We may share data with service providers who assist in platform operations: payment processors (PG companies), cloud hosting (Google Cloud/Firebase), and background check agencies. All third-party processors are contractually bound to handle data in accordance with PIPA.
privacy.section4Content: All personal data is encrypted at rest using AES-256 and in transit using TLS 1.3. Access to personal data is restricted by role-based access controls and requires multi-factor authentication. We conduct regular security audits and vulnerability assessments. Session monitoring data (activity logs, photos) is encrypted and stored separately from personally identifiable information.
privacy.section5Content: Account information is retained for the duration of your membership and for 1 year after account deletion, as required by the Act on Consumer Protection in Electronic Commerce. Children's personal data (age, special care notes, session photos) is automatically deleted 90 days after the session ends. Payment records are retained for 5 years in accordance with tax law requirements. Once the retention period expires or the processing purpose is fulfilled, personal information is destroyed without delay. Electronic files are permanently deleted using irreversible methods, and paper documents are shredded or incinerated.
privacy.section6Content: Under the Personal Information Protection Act, you have the right to: access your personal data and request copies (Article 35); correct inaccurate information (Article 36); request deletion of your data, subject to legal retention requirements (Article 36); suspend processing of your personal data (Article 37); and withdraw consent at any time (Article 38). To exercise these rights, contact privacy@petitstay.com. We will respond within 10 business days as required by law.
privacy.section7Content: We take the protection of children's data with the highest seriousness. Children's personal information (age, medical conditions, allergies, session photos) is collected solely for the purpose of providing safe childcare services. We collect the minimum data necessary and store it with enhanced encryption. Session photos are automatically deleted 90 days after the session. We never use children's data for marketing, analytics, or any purpose unrelated to the childcare session. A parent or legal guardian must provide consent before any child data is collected.
privacy.section8Content: We use essential cookies to maintain sessions and preferences. Analytics cookies are used only with your explicit consent and can be disabled in your browser settings. We do not use third-party advertising trackers.
privacy.section9Content: Our platform uses Google Cloud (Firebase) infrastructure which may process data in data centers outside the Republic of Korea. All international data transfers comply with PIPA requirements and are protected by standard contractual clauses. We ensure that any overseas data processor maintains security standards equivalent to or exceeding Korean requirements.
privacy.section10Content: For privacy-related inquiries, data access requests, or complaints, contact our Data Protection Officer at privacy@petitstay.com or by mail at: Petit Stay Inc., Gangnam-gu, Seoul, Republic of Korea. If you are unsatisfied with our response, you may file a complaint with the Personal Information Protection Commission (PIPC) at www.pipc.go.kr.

terms.title: Terms of Service
terms.subtitle: The agreement between you and Petit Stay.
terms.section1Content: By accessing or using the Petit Stay platform, you agree to be bound by these Terms of Service and our Privacy Policy. If you do not agree, please do not use our services. These terms constitute a legally binding agreement between you and Petit Stay Inc., a company incorporated under the laws of the Republic of Korea.
terms.section2Content: Petit Stay provides a technology platform connecting hotel partners with vetted childcare specialists on behalf of guest families. We facilitate specialist matching, bookings, real-time session monitoring, and payment processing. Petit Stay is a platform operator, not a childcare provider. The childcare service is provided directly by independent specialists.
terms.section3Content: You must provide accurate and complete information when creating an account. You are responsible for maintaining the security of your credentials and for all activity under your account. You must notify us immediately of any unauthorized access.
terms.section4Content: Bookings are confirmed once a specialist accepts and the hotel approves. Free cancellation is available up to 2 hours before the scheduled session start time. Cancellations made less than 2 hours before the session incur a 50% cancellation fee. No-shows are charged the full booking amount. Petit Stay reserves the right to cancel any booking for safety reasons, in which case a full refund will be issued.
terms.section5Content: Full payment is required at the time of booking confirmation. Pricing displayed at booking time includes the specialist fee, platform fee, and applicable taxes (VAT). Payments are processed securely through licensed Korean PG (Payment Gateway) partners. Refunds for eligible cancellations are processed within 7 business days to the original payment method.
terms.section6Content: Petit Stay performs background checks, certification verification, and hospitality training for all specialists. However, we do not guarantee absolute safety. Parents are responsible for providing accurate information about their children's health conditions, allergies, and special needs. Any misrepresentation may void insurance coverage.
terms.section7Content: Every session is covered by comprehensive liability insurance (up to ₩100,000,000 per incident). Petit Stay's total liability for any claim arising from platform use shall not exceed the amount paid for the relevant booking. We are not liable for indirect, incidental, special, or consequential damages. Insurance claims must be filed within 30 days of the incident.
terms.section8Content: Parents must provide accurate medical, allergy, and dietary information for each child before the session. Specialists are authorized to make reasonable care decisions during the session, including selecting age-appropriate activities and managing minor behavioral issues. Parents must remain reachable by phone during the entire session. Sessions are limited to the hotel premises unless explicitly agreed otherwise. Maximum session duration is 12 hours. The specialist-to-child ratio shall not exceed 1:3.
terms.section9Content: Users may not: provide false identity or qualification information; use the platform for any purpose other than legitimate childcare bookings; harass, threaten, or discriminate against specialists, hotel staff, or other users; attempt to circumvent the platform to arrange direct bookings with specialists; share login credentials or allow unauthorized access to their account; or use the platform in violation of any applicable law.
terms.section10Content: All content, trademarks, logos, and software on the Petit Stay platform are the property of Petit Stay Inc. or its licensors. Users may not copy, modify, distribute, or create derivative works from any platform content without prior written consent. User-generated content (reviews, feedback) grants Petit Stay a non-exclusive, royalty-free license to use, display, and distribute such content for platform purposes.
terms.section11Content: These terms are governed by the laws of the Republic of Korea. Any disputes arising from or in connection with these terms shall be submitted to the exclusive jurisdiction of the Seoul Central District Court. Before filing a lawsuit, both parties agree to attempt resolution through good-faith negotiation for at least 30 days. Consumer disputes may also be resolved through the Korea Consumer Agency or the e-Commerce Mediation Committee.
terms.section12Content: We may modify these terms at any time. Material changes will be communicated via email or in-app notification at least 30 days before they take effect. Continued use of the platform after changes take effect constitutes acceptance of the revised terms. If you do not agree with the revised terms, you may terminate your account before the effective date.

solutions.hotelSubtitle: Offer premium in-room childcare as a hotel amenity. Zero risk, zero overhead — just happier families.
solutions.hotelPainSubtitle: Family travelers need care solutions, but hotels lack the infrastructure.
solutions.hotelPain1Desc: Recommending unvetted sitters exposes your hotel to legal and reputational risk. Our Trust Protocol and insurance coverage eliminate this entirely.
solutions.hotelPain2Desc: Your front desk spends hours coordinating childcare requests. Petit Stay automates the entire process from booking to payment.
solutions.hotelPain3Desc: Family travelers represent 35% of luxury hotel guests. Without childcare, you lose F&B revenue when parents stay in their rooms.
solutions.hotelFeat1Desc: View, create, and manage all childcare bookings from a centralized dashboard.
solutions.hotelFeat2Desc: Real-time session tracking with activity logs, photos, and instant alerts.
solutions.hotelFeat3Desc: Automated commission reports and monthly settlement statements.
solutions.hotelFeat4Desc: Response within 2 hours, 99.5% fulfillment rate, 24/7 ops support.
solutions.hotelPricingHint: Commission-based pricing — no upfront cost. Hotels earn a revenue share on every booking.
solutions.hotelPricing1: Commission per booking — zero setup or installation fees
solutions.hotelPricing3: Increase hotel revenue per guest and boost guest satisfaction
solutions.hotelCtaTitle: Ready to partner with Petit Stay?
solutions.hotelCtaSubtitle: Join our growing network of premium hotels offering trusted childcare.
solutions.famTitle: Enjoy Your Trip. We'll Take Care of the Rest.
solutions.famSubtitle: Trusted, hotel-verified childcare specialists so you can make the most of every moment.
solutions.famTrust1Desc: Every specialist passes background checks, certification verification, and ongoing reviews.
solutions.famTrust2Desc: Activity logs, photo updates, and instant chat keep you connected wherever you are.
solutions.famTrust3Desc: Every session is backed by comprehensive liability insurance for complete peace of mind.
solutions.famTrust4Desc: Our platform and specialists support English, Korean, Japanese, and Chinese.
solutions.famSceneSubtitle: Whether it's a romantic dinner or a business meeting, we've got you covered.
solutions.famScene1Desc: Enjoy a romantic evening out while your children are safe and entertained in your hotel room.
solutions.famScene2Desc: Explore the city, visit attractions, or go on adventures without worrying about the kids.
solutions.famScene3Desc: Attend conferences or meetings knowing your children are in professional care.
solutions.famStep1Desc: Select your preferred date, time, and specialist through our app.
solutions.famStep2Desc: Complete our quick safety protocol with medical info and emergency contacts.
solutions.famStep3Desc: Get real-time updates while you enjoy your evening. It's that simple.
solutions.famCtaTitle: Ready to enjoy your next trip?
solutions.famCtaSubtitle: Sign up and book your first session in minutes.
solutions.specSubtitle: Join our network of elite childcare professionals working with the world's best hotels.
solutions.specBenefit1Desc: Earn your way to Gold tier with premium rates, priority bookings, and exclusive hotel partnerships.
solutions.specBenefit2Desc: Earn ₩60,000–₩90,000 per hour with transparent weekly settlements. Top earners exceed ₩3M monthly.
solutions.specBenefit3Desc: Set your own availability. Work evenings, weekends, or whenever suits your lifestyle.
solutions.specBenefit4Desc: Access ongoing training, certifications, and career development opportunities.
solutions.specEarningsSubtitle: Competitive rates that reflect your expertise and dedication.
solutions.specReqSubtitle: We maintain high standards to ensure the best care for families.
solutions.specReq1Desc: Valid certifications in CPR, First Aid, Early Childhood Education required. Licensed childcare teacher credential preferred.
solutions.specReq2Desc: Minimum 2 years professional childcare experience with verifiable references required. Hotel or resort work experience preferred.
solutions.specReq3Desc: English required, plus at least one of Korean, Japanese, or Chinese. Multilingual candidates preferred.
solutions.specCtaSubtitle: Apply today and start earning as a Petit Stay specialist.

onboarding.basicInfoDesc: Please provide your basic information to get started.
onboarding.specialtiesPlaceholder: e.g. Infant Care, First Aid, Music
onboarding.bioPlaceholder: Tell parents a bit about yourself...
onboarding.documentsDesc: Upload your ID, certifications, and background check documents.
onboarding.dragDropText: Drag & drop files here, or click to browse
onboarding.trainingDesc: Watch the training video on Petit Stay childcare protocols and safety standards.
onboarding.trainingVideoPlaceholder: Training Video — Petit Stay Safety & Hospitality Protocol
onboarding.trainingConfirm: I have watched the full training video and understand the protocols
onboarding.quizDesc: Answer the following questions about childcare protocols. You need 80% or higher to pass.
onboarding.quizFailed: You did not pass. Please review the training and try again.
onboarding.pendingDesc: Your application has been submitted and is being reviewed by our team. We will notify you once a decision has been made. Thank you for your patience.
onboarding.quizQ1: What should you do first when arriving at a guest room for a childcare session?
onboarding.quizQ1A: Immediately start playing with the child
onboarding.quizQ1B: Verify identity using the safe word and complete the room safety checklist
onboarding.quizQ1C: Wait for the parent to leave
onboarding.quizQ2: If a child shows signs of an allergic reaction, what is the correct first step?
onboarding.quizQ2A: Check the child's allergy card, administer prescribed medication if available, and contact emergency services
onboarding.quizQ2B: Give the child water and wait
onboarding.quizQ2D: Take the child to the hotel lobby
onboarding.quizQ3: How often should activity updates be logged during a session?
onboarding.quizQ3A: Only at the end of the session
onboarding.quizQ3C: Every 30 minutes or after each significant activity
onboarding.quizQ4: What is the correct procedure for child handoff at check-out?
onboarding.quizQ4A: Leave the child with the front desk
onboarding.quizQ4D: Verify parent identity, complete the check-out checklist, and obtain both signatures
onboarding.quizQ5: When should you report an incident to the Petit Stay operations team?
onboarding.quizQ5B: Immediately for any safety concern, injury, illness, or property damage
onboarding.quizQ5C: At the end of the session
